cursor.description: Use this cursor value in your next call to this endpoint to return the next set of items

line_item_id.description:
Present for all scopes.
Identifies a single line item.

line_item_lineage_id.description: Identifies a single line item across revisions.

delivery_source_id.description:
Present for daily and daily_by_conversion scopes.
Identifies a single delivery source.

creative_id.description:
Present for daily and daily_by_conversion scopes.
Identifies a single creative.

external_ad_ref.description:
Present for daily and daily_by_conversion scopes.
Identifies a single ad on the external source.

conversion_id.description:
Present for daily_by_conversion scope.
Identifies a single conversion.

delivered_date.description:
Present for daily_by_line_item and daily_by_conversion scopes.
The date the delivery took place.

actual_start_date.description:
Present for line_item scope.
First day Basis received delivery greater than zero for any delivery metric within the contracted flight range.

data_through_date.description:
Present for line_item scope.
Date stamp of the last day of delivery.

delivery_metrics.description: Present for line_item, daily_by_line_item, and daily scopes.

delivered_units.description: Impressions, clicks, views, or actions delivered. The definition of a unit depends on the line item's chosen rate type.

delivered_impressions.description: Impressions delivered, rounded to a whole number.

delivered_eligible_impressions.description: Impressions delivered against which Basis can measure viewability.

delivered_measurable_impressions.description: Impressions delivered where our viewability provider's script was able to determine if they were viewable or not.

delivered_viewable_impressions.description: Delivered impressions that our viewability provider's script was able to deem viewable.

delivered_interactions.description: Delivered impressions that were expanded or engaged.

delivered_video_starts.description: The number of times a video creative was started.

delivered_video_completions.description: Video impressions that completed (reached the fourth quartile marker).

delivered_total_view_conversions.description: View-through conversions, recorded after a user saw an ad from the campaign but did not click through.

delivered_total_click_conversions.description: Click-through conversions, recorded after a user clicked an ad in the line item.

delivered_total_conversions.description: All click-through and view-through conversions added together.

delivered_cpa_view_conversions.description: Cost per action for view-through conversions.

delivered_cpa_click_conversions.description: Cost per action for click-through conversions.

delivered_cpa_total_conversions.description: Cost per action for total conversions (click-through and view-through combined).

delivered_inventory_spend.description: Dollar amount spent on media inventory only.

delivered_data_spend.description: Dollar amount spent on data services used to serve media inventory.

total_spend.description:
Present for line_item and daily_by_line_item scopes.
Comprehensive amount of purchases based on billable delivery.

media_spend.description:
Present for line_item and daily_by_line_item scopes.
Dollar amount spent on media.

ad_serving_spend.description:
Present for line_item and daily_by_line_item scopes.
In Basis, Ad Serving is a specified ad server rate and calculated cost.

ecpm.description: Effective cost per mille (CPM), the average cost per 1000 impressions.

ecpcv.description: Effective cost per completed view (applies to video only).

ecpv.description: Effective cost per view (applies to video only).

to_kpi_goal_pct.description: Percentage to track the progress of the KPI Goal.

pacing_pct_spend.description: Pacing on-schedule indicator, expressed as a percentage of the expected or desired spend to date.

pacing_pct_units.description: Pacing on-schedule indicator, expressed as a percentage of the expected or desired units delivered to date.

projected_balance.description: The balance projected if the line item continues delivering at the current pace.

total_unspent.description: The amount budgeted that hasn't been spent.

delivery_spend_pct.description: The percent of the budgeted gross that has been spent on delivery.

target_spend.description: The amount budgeted to be spent by this line item.

target_units.description: The number of units to be delivered by this line item.

click_conversion_revenue.description: Total revenue associated with click-through conversions

view_conversion_revenue.description: Total revenue associated with view-through conversions
